items.title: BitAxe
items.description: BitAxe is an open-source, low-power Bitcoin ASIC miner designed for home mining. It bridges the gap between industrial-scale equipment and hobbyist participation in network security.

items.title: How Do I Start Mining at Home?
items.description: Step-by-step guide to solo and pooled home mining: hardware selection, Stratum V2/DATUM template control, hash marketplace on-ramps, and operational security.

items.title: KaboomRacks
items.description: ASIC mining hardware marketplace. Sells refurbished and used miners, often at prices accessible to home miners.

items.title: Mining Decentralization
items.description: Analysis of mining centralization pressures and decentralization mechanisms: Stratum V2, DATUM, hash marketplaces, small-pool coordination, and the path toward sovereign hash-rate ownership.

items.title: ShushMiner
items.description: Manufacturer of sound-dampening enclosures for Bitcoin ASIC miners. Targets residential miners who need to reduce noise without custom fabrication.
